summary: The implementation addresses all seven requirements with comprehensive frontend changes. Eagle logo animations include three-layer neon glow system, energy spread effects, GPU-accelerated container transforms, and breathing pulse. Service buttons scroll smoothly to contact section with press animations and highlight effects. Global smooth scrolling, 0.6s transitions, cubic-bezier button easing, and GPU-accelerated section animations are implemented site-wide.

hallucinated_features.description: Session storage tracking for eagle logo animation state
hallucinated_features.reason: EagleLogo.tsx uses sessionStorage to track if animation has played ('eagle-logo-animated'). This persistence mechanism was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: IntroAnimation session tracking and conditional rendering
hallucinated_features.reason: App.tsx includes logic to show/hide IntroAnimation based on sessionStorage ('introAnimationPlayed'). No requirement mentioned intro animation or session-based animation control.

hallucinated_features.description: WhatsApp-specific glow styling in contact cards
hallucinated_features.reason: ContactSection.tsx includes special hover effects for WhatsApp card ('hover:shadow-whatsapp-glow', green glow colors). Requirements did not specify special treatment for any particular contact method.

hallucinated_features.description: Service detail panel animations with neural network, chat bubbles, and workflow node animations
hallucinated_features.reason: ServiceDetailPanel.tsx renders different animations per service type (NeuralNetworkAnimation, ChatBubblesAnimation, etc.). No requirement mentioned service-specific animations in detail panels.
